# SOURCE: Closers Into Leaders (CIL)
> Cole Gordon | Closers.io
> Modules 0-8 + 118 Coaching Calls | 334 files | 9.4 MB
> Processed: 2026-03-26 | Pipeline: JARVIS Full Auto (Opus)

## Overview
Closers Into Leaders (CIL) is Cole Gordon's flagship comprehensive sales training program covering the complete lifecycle from individual sales mastery to building and managing high-performing sales teams. The program synthesizes Cole's experience selling $400K+/month as a solo sales rep and scaling multiple sales organizations.

## Structure
| Module | Topic | Files | Key Frameworks |
|--------|-------|-------|----------------|
| 0 | Intro/Onboarding | 7 | DPL x LTV Model, Alignment Triad, Triage Call Flow |
| 1 | Sales Fundamentals | 22 | Seven Belief Ladder, Reverse Selling System, Offer Models, Copy Platform, Inner Game |
| 2 | Client Acquisition | 52 | Pitch Codex, Outbound Messenger, Content Marketing, Pipeline Systems, Two-Step Posts |
| 3 | Closing Mastery | 37 | Belief Blueprint, Discovery Process, Pain/Doubt/Cost/Vision Questions, Transition, Hiring |
| 4 | Objections & Management | 45 | Big Three Objections, Financial Objection Process, Pacing, Big Three Management, Culture |
| 5 | Attraction Prospecting | 16 | APS System, 18 Non-CTA Categories, Other People's Traffic, CTA Offers |
| 6 | Pipeline & Follow-Up | 17 | Re-Offer Technique, Leadership Follow-Up, Two-Step Pipeline, Outbound Calls, Triage Script |
| 7 | Hiring & Team Building | 11 | New Hiring Model (Setter->Closer), Big Three, Scorecards, Onboarding/Ramp-Up |
| 8 | Management & Leadership | 9 | Rut Diagnosis, Data-Driven Decisions, Meeting Cadence, Tracking Systems |
| Calls | Coaching/Group Calls | 118 | Story Selling, Pre-Pitch, Socratic Flow, Offer Creation, Market Sophistication |

## Extraction Summary
- **Total elements:** 323
- L1 Philosophies: 67 | L2 Mental Models: 56 | L3 Heuristics: 90 | L4 Frameworks: 64 | L5 Methodologies: 46

## Key Frameworks
1. **Seven Belief Ladder** -- Pain, Doubt, Cost, Desire, Trust, Support, Money
2. **Reverse Selling System** -- Six-phase: Intro -> Info Gathering -> Transition -> Pitch -> Committing -> Objections
3. **Pitch Codex** -- Unique Mechanism + Bold Promises + 3-5 Pillars
4. **The Big Three** -- Tracking + Daily Meetings + EOD Reports
5. **Attraction Prospecting System** -- Organic lead gen from stranger to client
6. **DPL x LTV Model** -- Dollar Per Lead x Lifetime Value scaling
7. **Buying Pocket** -- Zone where prospect believes transformation possible but only with your help
8. **Setter-to-Closer Progression** -- 8-step team building model
9. **Re-Offer Technique** -- #1 follow-up close technique
10. **Story Selling** -- Seed case studies in discovery, deploy as proof in pitch

## Key Heuristics (with Numbers)
- 40-50% close rate = elite on cold traffic
- Agency two-call close: 5% -> 30% conversion
- 50 calls for statistical significance
- Hedge projections by 30-50%
- 25 calls/week x 20% = $15K/month closer income
- 3-5 pillars max in pitch
- Intro <= 3 minutes
- 25% validated close rate before hiring
- 10% closer commission standard
- 30-50 calls before firing decision
- Re-offer at 1-4 weeks (50% of follow-up closes)
- 100 outbound dials/day minimum
- Speed of dial = 2-3x answer rate multiplier
- Sleep (8.5h) took close rate from 25% to 40%
